message:
refactor(channel): replace condvar-based blocking with async waker model

Overhaul MPSC channel implementation to use Future-based async waiting
instead of std::sync::Condvar blocking. This prepares the channel for
integration with the async runtime's executor.

Key changes:
- Remove Condvar from ChannelShared, add waker queues instead
- send_wakers: VecDeque<Waker> for senders waiting on capacity
- recv_waker: Option<Waker> for receiver waiting on messages
- Define SendError and RecvError locally with Disconnected/Cancelled/Full variants
- Implement Future trait for send/receive operations

The waker model allows:
- Proper integration with async/await syntax
- Non-blocking waits that yield to the executor
- Cancel-safe operations via cooperative scheduling

Also simplifies broadcast channel implementation to match the new pattern
and updates runtime state management for cleaner async coordination.

This is part of the larger effort to build a from-scratch async runtime
with structured concurrency and cancellation support.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
